mapper.select:
SELECT A.SRVY_NO, A.SRVY_EMP_ID, A.SRVY_CN, A.SRVY_TTL, A.SRVY_BGNG_DT, A.SRVY_END_DT, A.SRVY_STTS, A.SRVY_NOPE, A.SRVY_ANON, A.SRVY_MLG FROM SURVEY A WHERE A.SRVY_STTS = '진행중'
AND SYSDATE >= A.SRVY_BGNG_DT AND SYSDATE < (A.SRVY_END_DT + 1)
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SURVEY_EMP B WHERE B.SRVY_NO = A.SRVY_NO AND B.EMP_ID = #{empId} AND B.SRVY_YN = 'Y' ) ORDER BY A.SRVY_BGNG_DT DESC

SELECT A.SRVY_NO, A.SRVY_CN, A.SRVY_EMP_ID, A.SRVY_TTL, A.SRVY_ANON, B.SRVY_DT, B.SRVY_MLG FROM SURVEY A INNER JOIN SURVEY_EMP B ON A.SRVY_NO = B.SRVY_NO WHERE B.EMP_ID = #{empId} AND B.SRVY_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY B.SRVY_DT DESC

SELECT SRVY_NO, SRVY_CN, SRVY_BGNG_DT, SRVY_END_DT, SRVY_NOPE, SRVY_ANON, SRVY_MLG, SRVY_TTL FROM SURVEY WHERE SRVY_STTS = '완료' OR SRVY_STTS = '30'
OR SYSDATE > (SRVY_END_DT + 1)
ORDER BY SRVY_END_DT DESC

SELECT A.SRVY_NO, A.SRVY_CN, A.SRVY_BGNG_DT, A.SRVY_END_DT, A.SRVY_STTS, A.SRVY_ANON, A.SRVY_TTL, A.SRVY_MLG, B.SRVY_QUEST_NO, B.SRVY_QUEST_CN, B.SRVY_QUEST_TYPE, C.SRVY_QUEST_ITEM_NO, C.SRVY_QUEST_ITEM_CN FROM SURVEY A LEFT OUTER JOIN SURVEY_QUEST B ON A.SRVY_NO = B.SRVY_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN SURVEY_QUEST_ITEM C ON B.SRVY_QUEST_NO = C.SRVY_QUEST_NO WHERE A.SRVY_NO = #{srvyNo} ORDER BY B.SRVY_QUEST_ORD, C.SRVY_QUEST_ITEM_NO
mapper.insert:
BEGIN -- [응답 데이터] MERGE INTO SURVEY_ANSWER A USING DUAL ON ( A.SRVY_NO = #{srvyNo} AND A.SRVY_QUEST_NO = #{srvyQuestNo} AND A.EMP_ID = #{empId} ) -- 응답 데이터가 있는 경우 WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.SRVY_ANS_CN = #{srvyAnsCn}, A.SRVY_ANS_DT = SYSDATE -- 처음 응답하는 경우 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( SRVY_ANS_NO, SRVY_QUEST_NO, SRVY_NO, SRVY_ANS_DT, EMP_ID, SRVY_ANS_CN ) VALUES ( SRVY_ANS_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{srvyQuestNo}, #{srvyNo}, SYSDATE, #{empId}, #{srvyAnsCn} );
-- [설문 대상자 상태] MERGE INTO SURVEY_EMP E USING DUAL ON ( E.SRVY_NO = #{srvyNo} AND E.EMP_ID = #{empId} ) -- 설문 중복 참여일 경우 WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET E.SRVY_YN = 'Y', E.SRVY_DT = SYSDATE, E.SRVY_MLG = #{srvyMlg, jdbcType=INTEGER} -- 설문 처음 참여일 경우 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( EMP_ID, SRVY_NO, SRVY_YN, SRVY_DT, SRVY_MLG ) VALUES ( #{empId}, #{srvyNo}, 'Y', SYSDATE, #{srvyMlg, jdbcType=INTEGER} ); END;
mapper.select: SELECT EMP_ID FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMP_STTS='Y' AND EMP_JBGD != '관리자'

SELECT S.SRVY_NO, S.SRVY_CN, S.SRVY_TTL, S.SRVY_NOPE, S.SRVY_ANON, Q.SRVY_QUEST_NO, Q.SRVY_QUEST_CN, Q.SRVY_QUEST_TYPE, I.SRVY_QUEST_ITEM_NO, I.SRVY_QUEST_ITEM_CN, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SURVEY_ANSWER A WHERE A.SRVY_QUEST_NO = Q.SRVY_QUEST_NO AND A.SRVY_ANS_CN = TO_CHAR(I.SRVY_QUEST_ITEM_NO) ) AS ITEM_COUNT, ANS.SRVY_ANS_CN FROM SURVEY S LEFT OUTER JOIN SURVEY_QUEST Q ON S.SRVY_NO = Q.SRVY_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN SURVEY_QUEST_ITEM I ON Q.SRVY_QUEST_NO = I.SRVY_QUEST_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN SURVEY_ANSWER ANS ON Q.SRVY_QUEST_NO = ANS.SRVY_QUEST_NO WHERE S.SRVY_NO = #{srvyNo} ORDER BY Q.SRVY_QUEST_ORD, I.SRVY_QUEST_ITEM_NO
SELECT SRVY_NO, SRVY_EMP_ID, SRVY_CN, SRVY_BGNG_DT, SRVY_END_DT, SRVY_STTS, SRVY_NOPE, SRVY_ANON, SRVY_TTL, SRVY_MLG FROM SURVEY ORDER BY SRVY_NO DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE SURVEY SET SRVY_STTS = '종료' WHERE
SRVY_END_DT < SYSDATE
AND SRVY_STTS = '진행중'
mapper.select: SELECT SRVY_NO, SRVY_EMP_ID, SRVY_CN, SRVY_BGNG_DT, SRVY_END_DT, SRVY_STTS, SRVY_NOPE, SRVY_ANON, SRVY_TTL, SRVY_MLG FROM SURVEY WHERE SRVY_NO = #{srvyNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE SURVEY SET SRVY_CN = #{srvyCn}, SRVY_END_DT = #{srvyEndDt}, SRVY_STTS = #{srvyStts}, SRVY_TTL = #{srvyTtl}, SRVY_MLG = #{srvyMlg} WHERE SRVY_NO = #{srvyNo}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM SURVEY WHERE SRVY_NO IN
#{vo.srvyNo}
mapper.update:
UPDATE SURVEY SET SRVY_STTS = '종료' WHERE SRVY_NO IN
#{item.srvyNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(CASE WHEN SRVY_STTS = '진행중' THEN 1 END) AS ongoing, COUNT(CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(SRVY_BGNG_DT, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM') THEN 1 END) AS monthlyNew FROM SURVEY

SELECT ROUND( NVL(SUM(S.SRVY_NOPE) / NULLIF(COUNT(S.SRVY_NO) * MAX(E_TOTAL.CNT), 0) * 100 , 0), 1) AS aveData FROM SURVEY S INNER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON S.SRVY_EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMP_STTS != 'N' AND EMP_JBGD != '관리자' ) E_TOTAL WHERE E.EMP_STTS != 'N'
SELECT COUNT(EMP_ID) FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMP_STTS='Y' AND EMP_JBGD != '관리자'

SELECT A.SRVY_ANS_NO, A.SRVY_ANS_DT, A.EMP_ID, E.EMP_NM, D.DEPT_NM, Q.SRVY_QUEST_NO, Q.SRVY_QUEST_ORD, Q.SRVY_QUEST_CN, Q.SRVY_QUEST_TYPE, CASE WHEN Q.SRVY_QUEST_TYPE = 1 THEN I.SRVY_QUEST_ITEM_CN ELSE A.SRVY_ANS_CN END AS ANS_CONTENT, TO_CHAR(A.SRVY_ANS_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS ANS_DATE FROM SURVEY_ANSWER A JOIN SURVEY S ON A.SRVY_NO = S.SRVY_NO JOIN SURVEY_QUEST Q ON A.SRVY_QUEST_NO = Q.SRVY_QUEST_NO LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON A.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN SURVEY_QUEST_ITEM I ON A.SRVY_ANS_CN = TO_CHAR(I.SRVY_QUEST_ITEM_NO) AND Q.SRVY_QUEST_NO = I.SRVY_QUEST_NO WHERE A.SRVY_NO = #{srvyNo} ORDER BY A.SRVY_ANS_DT DESC, Q.SRVY_QUEST_ORD ASC
